features: Durable, large cotton wool pads, for gentle cleansing and make-up removal
100 pure, soft cotton, offering softness and gentle cleansing for all skin types
Suitable for applying toners, removing nail polish and other beauty routines
Suitable for gently cleansing and caring for a baby's delicate skin
Convenient drawstring packaging to keep pads clean and protected whilst allowing easy access when needed
description: Product Description 50 Pure cotton wool large pads for applying cleansers and lotions; Smooth surface for use with nail polish remover and toner; Gentle, soft absorbent; Suitable for gently cleansing and caring for a baby's delicate skin; Does't leave fluff or residue on the skin Ingredients Cotton Wool Directions 1. Take a cotton pad and dampen it with water or a suitable makeup remover. 2. Gently apply the pad to the face to cleanse or remove makeup. 3. Dispose of the pad after use and wash hands thoroughly. Safety Warning Do not swallow, keep out of reach os small children & babies See more
